PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx ]]; then cd /Users/siro/Documents/dev/TodayCheck && npx eslint "$FILE" --max-warnings 0 2>&1 | tail -10; fi'

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "git commit"; then cd /Users/siro/Documents/dev/TodayCheck && npm run verify 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
